full_text:
Huangfu Mi (Shi’an) 皇甫謐 (士安)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huangfu Mi (皇甫謐), styledShi’an (士安). Wrote a treatise on acupuncture and moxibustion. He also wrote various biographies. Huangfu Mi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
